methods.Uri.Builder buildUpon(): Constructs a new builder, copying the attributes from this Uri.
methods.int compareTo(Uri other): Compares the string representation of this Uri with that of another.
methods.String decode(String s): Decodes '%'-escaped octets in the given string using the UTF-8 scheme.
methods.String encode(String s, String allow): Encodes characters in the given string as '%'-escaped octets using the UTF-8 scheme.
methods.String encode(String s): Encodes characters in the given string as '%'-escaped octets using the UTF-8 scheme.
methods.boolean equals(Object o): Compares this Uri to another object for equality.
methods.Uri fromFile(File file): Creates a Uri from a file.
methods.Uri fromParts(String scheme, String ssp,: Creates an opaque Uri from the given components.
methods.String getAuthority(): Gets the decoded authority part of this URI.
methods.boolean getBooleanQueryParameter(String: Searches the query string for the first value with the given key and interprets it as a boolean value.
methods.String getEncodedAuthority(): Gets the encoded authority part of this URI.
methods.String getEncodedFragment(): Gets the encoded fragment part of this URI, everything after the '#'.
methods.String getEncodedQuery(): Gets the encoded query component from this URI.
methods.String getEncodedSchemeSpecificPart(): Gets the scheme-specific part of this URI, i.e. everything between the scheme separator ':' and the fragment separator '#'.
methods.String getEncodedUserInfo(): Gets the encoded user information from the authority.
methods.String getFragment(): Gets the decoded fragment part of this URI, everything after the '#'.
methods.String getHost(): Gets the encoded host from the authority for this URI.
methods.String getLastPathSegment(): Gets the decoded last segment in the path.
methods.int getPort(): Gets the port from the authority for this URI.
methods.String getQuery(): Gets the decoded query component from this URI.
methods.String getQueryParameter(String key): Searches the query string for the first value with the given key.
methods.Set getQueryParameterNames(): Returns a set of the unique names of all query parameters.
methods.List getQueryParameters(String key): Searches the query string for parameter values with the given key.
methods.String getScheme(): Gets the scheme of this URI.
methods.String getSchemeSpecificPart(): Gets the scheme-specific part of this URI, i.e. everything between the scheme separator ':' and the fragment separator '#'.
methods.String getUserInfo(): Gets the decoded user information from the authority.
methods.int hashCode(): Hashes the encoded string represention of this Uri consistently with equals(java.lang.Object).
methods.boolean isAbsolute(): Returns true if this URI is absolute, i.e. if it contains an explicit scheme.
methods.boolean isHierarchical(): Returns true if this URI is hierarchical like "http://google.com".
methods.boolean isOpaque(): Returns true if this URI is opaque like "mailto:nobody@google.com".
methods.boolean isRelative(): Returns true if this URI is relative, i.e. if it doesn't contain an explicit scheme.
methods.Uri normalizeScheme(): Return an equivalent URI with a lowercase scheme component.
methods.Uri parse(String uriString): Creates a Uri which parses the given encoded URI string.
methods.String toString(): Returns the encoded string representation of this URI.
methods.Uri withAppendedPath(Uri baseUri, String: Creates a new Uri by appending an already-encoded path segment to a base Uri.
methods.void writeToParcel(Parcel out, Uri uri): Writes a Uri to a Parcel.
